text: Lesson 101 A card from Jimmy Listen to the tape then answer this question.
zh: 第101课 吉米寄来的明信片 听录音,然后回答这个问题。
zh_hant: 第101課 吉米寄來的明信片 聽錄音,然後回答這個問題。

text: Does grandmother seem pleased to get a card from Jimmy?
zh: 奶奶收到吉米寄来的明信片,看起来高兴吗?
zh_hant: 奶奶收到吉米寄來的明信片,看起來高興嗎?

text: Why/Why not?
zh: 为什么高兴,或者为什么不高兴?
zh_hant: 為什麼高興,或者為什麼不高興?

text: Read Jimmy's card to me please, Penny.
zh: 佩妮，请把吉米的卡片念给我听听。
zh_hant: 佩妮，請把吉米的卡片念給我聽聽。

text: 'I have just arrived in Scotland and I'm staying at a Youth Hostel.'
zh: “我刚到苏格兰，现在住在一家青年旅舍。”
zh_hant: “我剛到蘇格蘭，現在住在一家青年旅舍。”

text: Eh?
He says he's just arrived in Scotland.
He says he's staying at a Youth Hostel.
zh: 他说他住在一家青年旅舍。
zh_hant: 他說他住在一家青年旅舍。

text: You know he's a member of the Y.H.A. The what?
zh: 你知道他是青年旅舍协会的会员。什么协会?
zh_hant: 你知道他是青年旅舍協會的會員。什麼協會?

text: The Y.H.A., Mum.
The Youth Hostels Association.
What else does he say?
'I'll write a letter soon.
I hope you are all well.'
What?
Speak up, Penny.
I'm afraid I can't hear you.
He says he'll write a letter soon.
He hopes we are all well.
'Love, Jimmy.'
Is that all?
He doesn't say very much, does he?
can't write very much on a card, Mum.
zh: 妈，明信片上写不了太多字。
zh_hant: 媽，明信片上寫不了太多字。
